intro: A lab technician waves you over to a humming apparatus. "Care to be a test subject? It usually works. Usually. Either way you keep whatever it spits out... if it spits anything out."
title: The Experiment
description: A lab technician offers to run an experiment on the house. It usually pays out a high-tier reward, but there is a small chance it backfires - the reward is lost and you cover the cleanup. Decline to walk away clean.

1.label: Run the experiment
1.tooltip:
(+) Usually a high-tier reward
(?) Small chance it backfires and costs you
1.selected: You step onto the platform and the technician throws the switch...

2.label: Decline
2.selected: You decide not to be a guinea pig today and move on.

success: The apparatus hums and produces a perfectly good result - the reward is yours!
backfire: The apparatus shorts out in a shower of sparks! The result is ruined and you cover the cleanup bill.
